name: stech-email-tone-improver
description: Transform your cold or robotic emails into warm, human, and honest messages using Stech AI presence.

originalEmail.description: The original cold email provided by the user.

improvedEmail.description: The email rewritten by Stech AI with a warmer, more honest tone.

toneUsed.description: The tone applied (e.g., warm, empathetic, friendly).

status.description: The success or failure status of the processing.

timestamp.description: The processing timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
